_session_note: Major fitness formula overhaul. Sim harness (sim_test) built and running on Termux. All changes below confirmed in sim. biomeS.rs is sim version, game biome.rs not yet updated.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.target_platform: Termux (terminal) now, egui Android APK later
overview.status: active — sim harness running, fitness formula finalized, thresholds still being tuned
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: World state: land slots, active biomes, placed organisms, fitness resolution, biome contests, world effect application. Zero I/O.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks, two hands, discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

sim_harness.config: sim.toml — edit organism and land stats without recompile
sim_harness.note: biomeS.rs is the sim version of biome.rs — kept separate. Game biome.rs needs all sim fixes applied before next playtest.

formula_components.surplus: sum(max(0, factor - 1.0)) for all factors — total above-1 contribution
formula_components.deficit_term: product((f - critical) / (1.0 - critical)) for all f < 1.0 — scales surplus down as deficits worsen
formula_components.below_product: product(f) for all f < 1.0 — directly multiplies fitness down for deficits

fitness_system.formula_rationale: Surplus cannot compensate for deficits. Two strong deficits = death. One moderate deficit + surplus = reduced but viable.
fitness_system.critical_check: Any single factor below FITNESS_CRITICAL_NEED short-circuits and returns FITNESS_AUTO_DOWNGRADE * 0.5

thresholds.upgrade_if_best: 0.99 (anything healthy upgrades if best in group)

fitness_system.food_pool_timing: Calculated from LAST TURN's producer fitness — one-turn delay creates reaction window for boom-bust dynamics

resource_factor.rationale: Old log2 formula let water surplus compensate for food scarcity. New formula caps surplus so no single resource can mask deficits.

sunlight.mechanic: tolerance_factor(supply, sun_need, 999.0) — threshold, not abundance. Meeting need = factor 1.0, below need = sqrt falloff.
sunlight.shading: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K per size group, largest first

minerals.mechanic: resource_factor(share, mineral_need). share = (reach / total_reach) * minerals. Population cancels — competition is reach-based per individual.
minerals.note: total_reach = sum(reach * pop) so high-pop species dominates competition

water.mechanic: resource_factor(share, water_need * pop). Competitive, shared proportionally by need.

food.mechanic: resource_factor(share, food_need * pop). Pool = sum(prod_pop * last_fitness * multiplier). One-turn delay.
food.carnivore: prey_value = size * pop (herbivore/omnivore) or size * pop * 0.5 (carnivore). Divided by total_carn_pop for per-individual share.

food_pressure.applied_as: pressure_factor = 1/(1 + food_pressure + trampling). Passed into calc_fitness_producer as a factor.

trampling.formula: sum over herbivores: max(0, herb_size - prod_size) * herb_territory * herb_pop * PRESSURE_K2
trampling.rationale: Size differential — large herbivores trample small producers. Large producers immune to small herbivores. No division by producer biomass — scales with absolute herbivore numbers.
trampling.per_producer: Each producer experiences its own trampling based on its own size vs each herbivore size

predation_system.hunt_limit: carnivore.size * hunt_multiplier — prey must be STRICTLY LESS THAN
predation_system.prey_value: size * pop for herb/omni, size * pop * CARNIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR for carnivore prey
predation_system.competition_fix: total_prey_value divided by total_carn_pop (not species count) — each individual competes for prey share
predation_system.applied_as: factor in calc_fitness_animal factors list — enters both deficit_term and below_product

confirmed.PRESSURE_K2: NOT YET TUNED — trampling formula changed this session

constants.thresholds_status: upgrade thresholds not yet validated against new formula range

reference_land.note: minerals=12 confirmed — solo producer natural ceiling P9, resource and crowding both active. POP_MAX=6 is card cap.

design_goals.boom_bust: H>P should be unstable. P1 H1 both grow. H overshoots P, P collapses, H collapses behind it. Window of 3-4 turns to play carnivore.
design_goals.carnivore_role: Stabilizes herbivore overshoot. With carnivore present system reaches P3 H3 C1-2 equilibrium instead of collapse.
design_goals.reaction_window: One-turn food pool delay gives players time to react to producer stress before full collapse.
design_goals.card_ceiling: POP_MAX=6 is the hard card limit. Resource/space ceiling should be around P8-9 so card cap is reached before resource exhaustion.

next_session_tasks: Tune PRESSURE_K2 for new trampling formula (currently untested with size differential)
Validate upgrade thresholds against new fitness formula range
Test P1 H1 boom-bust dynamics — confirm both grow then H overshoots and both collapse
Test P+H+C three-species dynamics — confirm carnivore stabilizes
Apply all biomeS.rs changes to game biome.rs
Update game types.rs constants (SHADE_K=0.4, PRESSURE_K1=0.1, PRESSURE_K2=TBD, thresholds)
cargo build game and fix compile errors
